name: Banana Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized saucepan, bring honey to a boil. Add the baking soda and stir until combined.
2. Pour the mixture over the oats and stir to combine. Cover and let stand for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Gradually add sugar, beating until fluffy.
4. Blend in eggs. Add the oat mixture and mashed bananas; blend well.
5. Sift together flour, remaining baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Add to the creamed mixture and blend well.
6. Pour batter into two greased and waxed paper-lined 8-inch round cake pans.
7. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 30 to 35 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for about 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the pans and cool completely.
9. For frosting, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add sugar, beating until the frosting is smooth and of spreading consistency.
10. Spread between layers and over top of the cake. Refrigerate before serving. Makes one 2-layer cake.
